Request a demo

Mobile Apps

Your compound fits in your pocket.

Security operations don't happen at a desk. SYAG's mobile apps give guards and supervisors everything they need in the field — patrol tracking, incident reporting, visitor scanning, and live dispatch — all over a standard 4G connection.

The Guard App — Built for the field

Guards in your compound download the SYAG Guard App and operate their entire shift from their phone. No paper forms. No radio check-ins that go unlogged.

What guards do on the app

  • Clock in and out with GPS-verified location
  • View their patrol route and assigned checkpoints
  • Scan NFC tags or QR codes at checkpoints to verify presence
  • File incident reports with photos, audio, and GPS coordinates
  • Receive dispatch notifications from supervisors
  • View their shift schedule and post orders
  • Submit handover notes at shift end

Technical specs

  • Available on Android (4.4+) and iOS (12+)
  • Optimised for entry-level Android devices — no high-spec hardware required
  • Works over 4G cellular — no Wi-Fi required
  • Offline mode: checkpoint scans and incident drafts saved locally, sync when connected
  • Available in Arabic (RTL) and English

The Supervisor App — Command from anywhere

Supervisors see a live picture of their site without being chained to a control room screen.

What supervisors do on the app

  • View the live guard map — see every active guard's position in real time
  • Monitor patrol compliance — see which checkpoints have been scanned and which are overdue
  • Receive incident notifications and approve or escalate
  • Dispatch guards to specific locations
  • Communicate with guards via in-app messaging
  • View the incident feed for their site
  • Access visitor logs and approve contractor access

The Admin Dashboard — Full control from the browser

Compound administrators access SYAG via the web dashboard — no software installation required. Any modern browser on any device.

Admin capabilities

  • Configure sites, zones, and patrol routes
  • Manage users, roles, and access permissions
  • Set up Flow automation rules
  • View the full Operations Center — all guards, incidents, cameras, and IoT devices
  • Pull reports — incident trends, guard performance, visitor history, asset status
  • Manage the visitor blacklist and contractor access

System requirements: Modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). Internet connection. No installation required.

Request a demo to see the apps in action.
